steps.title: Separate the two sentences
steps.content: The first part names Public Eye as an ethical AI-powered crowd-monitoring system. The next part begins with an introductory participial phrase, Analyzing video streamed from cameras, before the independent clause about what the AI algorithm determines.

steps.title: Prevent a comma splice
steps.content: A and B attach analyzing to the first sentence, leaving the independent clause joined only by a comma. D gives no sentence boundary and still produces a run-on structure. A period after system cleanly starts the new sentence. The answer is C.
